reasoning_model_1: The generated audio accurately follows the script with no content errors. model_comparison: Both models successfully execute the 'fast pace' instruction, receiving high scores for the core feature. Model 2 delivers the text at a fast, brisk pace that feels more controlled and professional, fitting the business context of the sentence perfectly. Because Model 2 achieves the target feature (Fast Pace) while maintaining superior naturalness and fluency, it is the predicted human preference.
